title: valeriana graciliflora
intro: Valeriana graciliflora, also known as the Slender Valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Australia and New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Valeriana graciliflora include its sedative and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to the presence of valerenic acid and other volatile compounds. Valeriana graciliflora can be used to promote relaxation, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality, and it is often prepared in teas, tinctures, and capsules for its herbal benefits.
